<!--
Shared math macros. Included at the top of every chapter via
  {{< include /_macros.qmd >}}
The HTML block feeds KaTeX/MathJax; the LaTeX block feeds the PDF preamble.
Keep the two lists in sync. Add sparingly — macros you will actually reuse.
-->

```{=html}
<div style="display:none">
\(
\newcommand{\R}{\mathbb{R}}
\newcommand{\N}{\mathbb{N}}
\newcommand{\E}{\mathbb{E}}
\newcommand{\vocab}{\mathcal{V}}
\newcommand{\given}{\mid}
\newcommand{\softmax}{\operatorname{softmax}}
\newcommand{\KL}{\operatorname{KL}}
\newcommand{\loss}{\mathcal{L}}
\newcommand{\params}{\theta}
\newcommand{\dmodel}{d_{\mathrm{model}}}
\newcommand{\vx}{\mathbf{x}}
\newcommand{\vh}{\mathbf{h}}
\newcommand{\vq}{\mathbf{q}}
\newcommand{\vk}{\mathbf{k}}
\newcommand{\vv}{\mathbf{v}}
\newcommand{\mW}{\mathbf{W}}
\newcommand{\mX}{\mathbf{X}}
\newcommand{\argmax}{\operatorname*{arg\,max}}
\newcommand{\argmin}{\operatorname*{arg\,min}}
\)
</div>
```

```{=latex}
\newcommand{\R}{\mathbb{R}}
\newcommand{\N}{\mathbb{N}}
\newcommand{\E}{\mathbb{E}}
\newcommand{\vocab}{\mathcal{V}}
\newcommand{\given}{\mid}
\newcommand{\softmax}{\operatorname{softmax}}
\newcommand{\KL}{\operatorname{KL}}
\newcommand{\loss}{\mathcal{L}}
\newcommand{\params}{\theta}
\newcommand{\dmodel}{d_{\mathrm{model}}}
\newcommand{\vx}{\mathbf{x}}
\newcommand{\vh}{\mathbf{h}}
\newcommand{\vq}{\mathbf{q}}
\newcommand{\vk}{\mathbf{k}}
\newcommand{\vv}{\mathbf{v}}
\newcommand{\mW}{\mathbf{W}}
\newcommand{\mX}{\mathbf{X}}
\newcommand{\argmax}{\operatorname*{arg\,max}}
\newcommand{\argmin}{\operatorname*{arg\,min}}
```
